source: Vital Statistics of India based on the Civil Registration System 2023
publisher: Office of the Registrar General & Census Commissioner, India (ORGI)
extractedFrom: Section 3.14: Medical attention received at the time of birth and death, p.56

medicalAttentionAtDeath.note: The CRS report says complete medical-attention information was received from 35 States/UTs; Sikkim was excluded for partial information and Punjab excludes cases registered after more than one year.

notes: Death registration level is registered deaths divided by SRS-estimated deaths.
CRS records annual registered deaths, not daily all-cause deaths by district for heat-attribution analysis.
Medical attention at death is not the same as medical certification of cause of death; MCCD separately reports medically certified deaths.
